## About

🎯 **DCYFR AI Sandbox** is an experimentation environment for the [DCYFR AI Harness](https://github.com/dcyfr/dcyfr-ai).

## Quick Links

- 📚 [Getting Started Guide](GETTING-STARTED.md)
- 💡 [Examples](examples/)
- 🧪 [Tests](tests/)
- 📖 [Main Documentation](https://github.com/dcyfr/dcyfr-ai)

## What's Inside

- **Examples** - Practical demonstrations of framework features
- **Tests** - Validation and experimentation test suites
- **Utilities** - Helper functions and tools

## Installation

```bash
npm install
```

## Usage

```bash
# Run examples
npm run example:basic
npm run example:plugins
npm run example:agents

# Run tests
npm run test:run
npm run test:coverage
```

## Contributing

We welcome contributions! See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) for guidelines.
